title: Coordination with Regional Offices. The powers and functions of the
content: 46 MWPB shall be without prejudice to the provision of legal assistance to victims, the 47 conduct of investigation and special operation, and the filing of cases for illegal 48 recruitment, trafficking in persons, and related cases by the Regional Offices within their 49 respective territorial jurisdictions, international ports and seaports, included. These, 50 however, shall be coordinated with and reported to the MWPB for purposes of 51 documentation, monitoring, and inter-agency coordination. 52 53

metadata.source_file: [NOTICE TO PUBLIC] CLEAN DRAFT OF THE DMW SEABASED RULES.pdf
